title: Mailchimp vs Brevo (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp vs Brevo: pricing, features, and performance. Find the best email marketing platform for your business needs.
h1: Mailchimp vs Brevo: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: Mailchimp and Brevo are both popular email marketing platforms offering freemium models, but they serve different business needs. Mailchimp excels at simplicity for beginners, while Brevo provides broader omnichannel capabilities including SMS and WhatsApp. This comparison will help you decide which platform aligns best with your marketing goals.

comparison_table.tool_a: Drag-drop editor, automation, A/B testing, segmentation

comparison_table.tool_b: SMS, WhatsApp, live chat, CRM, transactional API

choose_a_if: You're a complete beginner looking for an intuitive, easy-to-learn interface
You need landing page building and basic email marketing functionality
You want to stay on the lowest budget possible initially with affordable paid tiers
choose_b_if: You need omnichannel marketing with SMS, WhatsApp, and email in one platform
You require a transactional email API for automated notifications
You want the largest free tier with 100,000 contacts included

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your needs. Mailchimp is more beginner-friendly with simpler navigation and lower entry costs, while Brevo offers superior value with more included features, better customer reviews, and multi-channel capabilities. For basic email marketing, Mailchimp works well; for advanced marketing automation and omnichannel campaigns, Brevo excels.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Brevo?
faq.a: Brevo offers better value despite a higher starting paid price ($25 vs $13). Brevo's free tier supports 100,000 contacts compared to Mailchimp's 500, and includes SMS and WhatsApp. For small businesses staying on the free plan, Brevo is dramatically more cost-effective.

faq.q: Can I switch from Brevo to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your contact lists and campaign data. Most migrations take just a few hours. However, consider that Mailchimp offers fewer features than Brevo, so you may lose functionality like SMS and live chat capabilities after switching.
